overview: All India Help Services is a bilingual (Hindi/English) marketplace portal connecting people across India with verified service providers in 9 categories: Government, Legal, Medical, Education, Financial, Home, Technology, Travel, and Business. Users can discover providers, submit inquiries, leave reviews, and manage their profiles — while admins oversee the entire platform.
features: Search and filter by category, location, rating
View provider profiles with reviews and verified badges
Admin panel for approvals and management
